description_long: This is a black wireless game controller, most closely resembling the Xbox controller design. The front face features two analog sticks, a directional pad, four colored action buttons labeled A, B, X, and Y, and a central Xbox logo button. The top edge includes two shoulder buttons and two triggers, as well as a USB port for charging or wired connectivity. The controller has an ergonomic, contoured shape with textured grips for comfortable handheld use. The surface is primarily matte black plastic with some glossy accents around the buttons and logo. The overall build suggests durability and is designed for frequent manual interaction.
description: A black ergonomic wireless game controller with dual analog sticks, colored action buttons, and a central Xbox logo button. The surface is mostly matte plastic with some glossy details.
description_view_0: Front view showing all buttons, analog sticks, D-pad, and the Xbox logo button.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the right grip, button layout, and the controller's contoured shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment, shoulder buttons, triggers, and USB port.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the left, emphasizing the left grip and the ergonomic design.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, analog sticks, D-pad, triggers
